You were trying to cross the border rught
You walked right into that imperial ambush
I remember sitting on the bed watching my brother play and yelling fus ro dah whenever he casted it
imagine randomly in the night just hearing that
I also miss having minecraft on the computer
I didnt even have a mouse so id have to use the track pad built into the keyboard
And id ask my brother to help me install mods on it
I still play Minecraft on a Mac but I don’t play it as much as I use to
did someone make a one in million guide?
oh me new just wanna see what other people thought ig
Haven’t played wordle for 2 months now
It's a trick of the light
Guys who do I choose with the new sepirot capture item??
Anyone know if there is a downloadable version of Coda of Scorch but only Gdolls first phase ?
The one on this server has phase 1 and 2 together
He’s John Dark Mute after all
That’s what I was saying, ngl if he had one coin w reuse it would have been ring sang w rusty coin all over again lol
Just make it two coins like Rien had
Ngl, I keep forgetting it’s 2 coin w reuse idk why
And they could also make it like Mylnar’s EGO where it has the conditional of no reuse
From Rusty coin or some shit
Funny joke running around actually, he’s larping a larper who’s larping a larper who’s larping his dead wife
Ngl when I first saw that, the first thing I thought of is that they actually learned from the ring sang incident 😭😭😭
And why did they make the final coin have the description of it being scythe for the entire skill on the 9th coin and not on combat
I mean I don’t think it’ll make a that much of a difference isn’t it 1 different weapon per coin?
I thought the weapons lasted the entire skill
Also, found it wierd that he meet (or at least saw) argilia
Yeah that’s what I thought from the name of the scythe passive as well
Ngl I don’t think we’re ready for an actual color id (even tho we technically have one already)
Cuz argilia’s COPY is just straight up gaurnteed crit
Liu Gregor passive on furioso would go hard
+30% dmg for subsequent coins after the 3rd coin on the skill
There is 6 coins after the 3rd coin on furioso so
So it’d be amazing for md solo although he’d lack regen
But I think he has way too much fucking speed to be viable for on team usage of the skill
The regen might be able to come from R.B Ryoshu and Wei sang ig
Ye ngl that balances him then
I wonder when albina Faust will come
Or a new waw for her
Cause KJH doesn’t want to make another ring id
I mean there more of a tank
I wonder if Rien will get so much speed that it matches cinq ids
Imagine a skill that eliminates all your skill slot but clashes with every skill
Either shield spam or the passive will have the thorns like  ability in it cause that’s what makes albina. Will probably have a cap though
Ngl this conditional would prob be a aleph ego
Bro, I just hope it’s not a one coin skill 3 that just leave both of them vulnerable for a entire turn or 2
I forgot about the ring fight cause of how fast it was
It was a ramp up with skills
We already got big bird Gregor
Cause he’s the smallest of them all
I mean could also be Don
It would contrast with her theme
Since judgment is based on unfair justice
Ngl tho I still think it’s Merusault
I mean he also does get hella drip
We only have one piece of Walpurgis content so far huh
And next one is lob corp so
We cycled through all the sinners now
Imagine if the next one is more mid than the general invitation one
Which was literally just burn through enkephalin, no unique battle, no side story
Yk the new nickname they have for rein Yi sang 😭😭😭
Ngl they didn’t expect bleed tho
The perfect anti Rien ID is the Rien ID
imagine his self bleed just kills him
Riensang when he enters La Mancha Land
And then morositas pops off making the Bloodfiends even out
happy lunar new year from Vietnam
i was doing family stuff at midnight :>>>
